tasks.title: Implement Password Gate with Next.js Middleware
tasks.description: Create single shared password protection covering all routes using Next.js middleware and session cookies
tasks.details: Use Next.js 14+ middleware.ts to intercept all routes except /api/auth. Create /api/auth POST endpoint validating against process.env.APP_PASSWORD. Set httpOnly, secure cookie with maxAge=30 days, sameSite='strict'. Render centered branded password form component with auto-focus input, shake animation on wrong password. Founder picker modal after first auth storing selection in separate cookie.
tasks.testStrategy: Test middleware blocks unauth routes, /api/auth sets cookie on correct password, rejects wrong password, cookie persists 30 days, founder picker stores correctly, mobile responsive form works on iPhone

tasks.title: Setup Next.js Project with Tailwind CSS and TriBe Brand Tokens
tasks.description: Initialize Next.js 14+ App Router project with Tailwind CSS configured with TriBe brand colors and typography
tasks.details: npx create-next-app@latest with app router, typescript, tailwind. Configure tailwind.config.js with custom colors: background:#faf7f2, card:#ffffff, border:#eae4da, text:#1a1a1a, muted:#8a8580, teal:#2b8a88, coral:#e85d4e, sage:#a8b5a0, amber:#e8a33d. Set fonts: Georgia for display, system-ui for UI. Max-width 440px container. Mobile-first responsive design.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify Tailwind compiles with custom tokens, brand colors render correctly across components, Georgia headlines display on wiki pages, mobile viewport constraints work, no bundle size issues

tasks.title: Build Home Screen with Card Layout and Founder Colors
tasks.description: Create mobile-first home screen with vertically stacked cards using TriBe brand system and founder color borders
tasks.details: Fixed order: header(logo+subtitle), state sentence(editable MD), meeting button(teal gradient), radar card, group table card, lanes card(3 equal founder blocks with color borders), tasks card(tabs), tools grid(2x3), wiki link, this week, FAB(coral fixed bottom). Cards: white bg, #eae4da border, 16px radius/padding. Use CSS grid/flexbox, max-width 440px centered.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify card order fixed, founder lanes equal size with correct color borders(teal/shawn,coral/mark,sage/michael), FAB fixed bottom-center thumb-reachable, responsive stacks correctly on iPhone

tasks.title: Implement Wiki Page Renderer with TOC and Keyword Search
tasks.description: Create Wikipedia-style markdown renderer for wiki/ files with auto TOC, keyword search, and section link cards
tasks.details: Use Next.js [...path] catch-all route reading .md files via GitHub Contents API. remark/rehype pipeline for MD→HTML. Extract H2/H3 for TOC with anchor links. Keyword search indexes all wiki/ files on mount, filters by string match showing dropdown with snippets. Georgia serif headlines, system-ui body. Colored bullets(teal/active,amber/decision,coral/idea,gray/archived). At-a-glance box, update footer.
tasks.testStrategy: Test renders any wiki/[path].md, TOC jumps correctly, search finds across files with context, colored bullets match categories, no raw MD syntax visible, <1s render time

tasks.title: Develop Add Something Bottom Sheet with File Write
tasks.description: Build quick-capture bottom sheet routing to lane/brainstorm folders via GitHub API writes
tasks.details: FAB triggers fixed bottom sheet(translateY animation, backdrop). Grabber handle, large textarea(auto-grow), 3 buttons(Lane teal default, Brainstorm coral, Watch Email disabled+Phase2 badge). Save generates YYYY-MM-DD-HH-mm-slug.md (slug=first5words kebab), writes to founders/[founder]/lane|brainstorm/ via GitHub Contents API. Confirmation toast shows destination/path.
tasks.testStrategy: Test sheet animation smooth 300ms, writes correct filename/path per founder selection, disabled Watch button shows Phase2 badge, toast confirms exact file created, mobile thumb-friendly

tasks.title: Implement GitHub Contents API Integration for Read/Write
tasks.description: Create API routes for reading/writing markdown files from private GitHub repo using PAT
tasks.details: Next.js API routes: GET /api/repo/[...path] reads file tree/content via GitHub Contents API (base64 decode MD). POST /api/repo/[path] creates/updates files (base64 encode). Use process.env.GITHUB_PAT (fine-grained repo scope). Cache reads with revalidatePath for ISR. Handle directory listing for wiki navigation. Error handling for 404/private repo.
tasks.testStrategy: Test reads all wiki/ files correctly decoded, writes new files with correct structure/timestamps, directory listing works, ISR revalidates on write, PAT permissions sufficient

tasks.title: Build Group Table with Status Lifecycle and Decision Records
tasks.description: Create decision tracking system with status machine and auto decision record generation
tasks.details: Parse wiki/group-table.md YAML frontmatter array: {id,raised_by,raised_at,title,reason,questions[],prep[],status,resolution{}}. Status cycle buttons(raised→discussed→decided→executing→complete). Resolution modal captures decision text/via/source/decided_at. On resolve: create wiki/decisions/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md template. Prep items inject to Tasks card(dotted circle,gray text).
tasks.testStrategy: Test status advances correctly, resolution creates decision file with template, prep renders differently in Tasks, lifecycle forward-only, unanimous rule messaging

tasks.title: Implement Radar Card with Urgency Zones and Conditional Render
tasks.description: Build early-warning radar parsing wiki/radar.md with zone thresholds and empty-state hiding
tasks.details: Parse wiki/radar.md structured items{zone,title,description,date,source}. Sort red→yellow→sage. Render only populated zones(RED dot+header,etc). Empty=all zones empty→return null (no card). Zone colors match thresholds from CLAUDE.md. Each item: color dot+bold title+meta+source link.
tasks.testStrategy: Test parses radar.md correctly, sorts by zone urgency, empty state hides card completely, populated zones show headers/dots, mobile row layout clean

tasks.title: Create Founder Lanes and Brainstorm Display Components
tasks.description: Render founder directories with standard lane template and home screen 2-3 active items
tasks.details: Read founders/[shawn|mark|michael]/{lane,brainstorm}/ listing latest 2-3 active lane items per founder for home card(equal size, color left-border 4px). Lane pages: title,status,why,next,zone,reverse-chrono log template. Brainstorms freeform no template. Exploring zone dimmed/tagged. Recent-update subtle markers.
tasks.testStrategy: Test home lanes equal visual weight, color borders correct, lane pages follow template, 2-3 truncation works, exploring items dimmed, founder-specific paths

tasks.title: Implement Meeting Quick-Launch and Tasks/Tools Cards
tasks.description: Add one-tap Google Meet + Tasks tabbed view + Tools 2x3 grid to home screen
tasks.details: Meeting button: window.open('https://meet.google.com/new'), navigator.clipboard.writeText(link), toast 'Link copied!', sms://+mailto: deeplinks. Tasks: ToDo/Done tabs from tasks.md, owner color dots, prep dotted-circle gray. Tools: hardcoded 2x3 grid linking Gmail/Drive/Cap/Manifesto/Chat/Calendar. State sentence editable MD field.
tasks.testStrategy: Test meet link generates/copies, deeplinks open native apps, Tasks tabs switch+color coding, Tools grid 2x3 responsive, state sentence saves to file

tasks.title: Setup Vercel Deployment with Custom Domain and Environment Variables
tasks.description: Configure Vercel project linking GitHub repo with app.tribebenefits.com domain and env vars
tasks.details: Vercel dashboard: import tribe-founders-wiki repo, auto-deploys on main push. Add env vars: APP_PASSWORD, GITHUB_PAT. Custom domain app.tribebenefits.com (DNS CNAME). Enable ISR for dynamic pages. Password protection via middleware (not Vercel feature). Test mobile performance <2s load.
tasks.testStrategy: Test auto-deploys on git push, domain resolves, env vars load (no leaks), middleware protects all routes, mobile Lighthouse score >90, <2s home load
